scripts.start:ui: cd frontend && bun install && bun run build && cd .. && bun --hot run src/index.ts
scripts.dev: bunx concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "bun --hot run src/index.ts" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all: cd ../tracker && swift build -c release && cd ../bun-app && bun install && cd frontend && bun install && cd .. && bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,ui,tracker -c blue,magenta,green "bun --hot run src/index.ts" "cd frontend && bun run dev" "cd ../tracker && .build/release/ActivityTracker"
scripts.restart: lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; bun --hot run src/index.ts
scripts.build: cd frontend && bun install && bun run build
